menu.start: Welcome to Adamant Stars 🏪 This bot was created to buy Telegram Stars without KYC verification at the lowest prices. By using the bot, you confirm that you have read and agree to: 👤 User Agreement 🔒 Privacy Policy

buy_list.self: Select the product you want to buy 👇

stars.self: Enter the required amount of stars 🪙 🏷 Minimum: {MIN_STARS} 🏷 Maximum: {MAX_STARS} 👤 Sending to account: @{username}

payment.ton: ‼️ Invoice valid for 30 minutes ‼️ Order Details 🎁 {amount} Telegram Stars to user @{username} 👤 Payment Requisites 💳 Network: {source} 💱 Amount: {amount_ton} 💰 Address: {BANK} Comment (memo): {order_id} ❗️ Send the exact amount and comment to the specified address, otherwise the payment will NOT BE COUNTED

slow.usd: ‼️ Automatic payment with this method is not available yet ‼️ We deeply apologize and hope it will be available soon. For now, you can top up your Adamant Balance via support below 👇 You can send any desired amount to the cards 💳 💰 Visa: 4297140070403256 (F.G.) 💰 MasterCard: 5259357077807353 (F.G.) ❗️ If you don't contact support within half an hour of sending, your top-up will NOT BE COUNTED. Please also send the receipt and your Telegram ID (/id) for maximum speed
slow.uzs: ‼️ Automatic payment with this method is not available yet ‼️ We deeply apologize and hope it will be available soon. For now, you can top up your Adamant Balance via support below 👇 You can send any desired amount to the cards 💳 💰 Uzcard: 5614685200470271 (F.G.) ❗️ If you don't contact support within half an hour of sending, your top-up will NOT BE COUNTED. Please also send the receipt and your Telegram ID (/id) for maximum speed

payment.cryptomus: ‼️ Invoice valid for 1 hour ‼️ Order Details 🎁 {amount} Telegram Stars to user @{username} 👤 Payment Requisites 💳 Network: {source} 💱 Amount: {amount_usd} 💰 Payment link: {link} ❗️ Pay the order via the link in the requisites or via the button below (both options are identical)
payment.success: 🎉 Payment Received 🎉 Order Details 🎁 Network: {provider} Amount: {cost} 💰 Quantity: {amount} 💫 Recipient: @{username} 👤 ❗️ If you still haven't received the order, please wait a few minutes ⏳

payment.top_up: Your Adamant Balance has been successfully topped up by {amount} coins 💰 Your current balance is: {balance} coins

referal.self: Here is your referral link: {link} People joined via your link: {came} 👤 Stars purchased: {stars_bought} ({dollar_stars}$) Your share: {users_money} coins ❗️ All your earnings are automatically added to your Adamant Balance
